page_metadata.biotools__summary: StarPep toolbox is a software for studying the antimicrobial peptides' (AMPs) chemical space with molecular network-based representations and similarity searching models. This application aims to contribute to peptide drug repurposing, development, and optimization.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: StarPep toolbox is a software for studying the antimicrobial peptides' (AMPs) chemical space with molecular network-based representations and similarity searching models. This application aims to contribute to peptide drug repurposing, development, and optimization.
